creator: ggg_mail@inbox.ru
text:
I tried the same config with mpd5 on another machine which is FreeBSD 7.0 i386, and I got the same result: systems freezed.

I catched mpd5 output until freeze,here it goes starting from the point of authentification:

[L1] LCP: auth: peer wants CHAP, I want nothing
[L1] LCP: LayerUp
[L1] CHAP: rec'd CHALLENGE #1 len: 32
[L1]  Name: "vpdn-campus"
[L1] CHAP: Using authname "Login"
[L1] CHAP: Ssending response #1 len: 27
[L1] CHAP: rec'd SUCCESS #1 len: 4
[L1] authorization successful
[L1] Matched action: 'Bundle "B1" ""' 
[L1] Link: Join Bundle "B1"
[B1] Bundle: Status update: up 1 link total bandwidth 64000 kbps
[B1] IPCP: Open event
[B1] IPCP: state changed Initial --> Starting
[B1] IPCP: LayerStart
[B1] IPCP: Up event
[B1] IPCP: state change Starting --> Req-Sent
[B1] IPCP: SendConfigReq #1
[B1] IPADDR 0.0.0.0
[B1]   COMPPROTO VJCOMP, 16 comp. channels no comp-cid
[B1] IPCP: rec'd Configure Request #1 (Req-Sent)
[B1]   COMPPROTO VJCOMP, 16 comp. channels allow comp-cid
[B1]   IPADDR 193.125.142.233
[B1]   193.125.142.233 is OK
[B1]  IPCP: SendConfigAck #1
[B1]   COMPPROTO VJCOMP, 16 comp. channels allow comp-cid
[B1]  IPADDR 193.125.142.233
[B1] IPCP: state change Req-Sent --> Ack-Sent
[B1] IPCP: rec'd Configure Nak #1 (Ack-Sent)
[B1]   IPADDR 194.85.82.184
[B1]   194.85.82.184 is OK
[B1] IPCP: SendConfigReq #2
[B1]  IPADDR 194.85.82.184
[B1]   COMPPROTO VJCOMP, 16 comp. channels no comp-cid
[B1] IPCP: rec'd Configure Ack #2 (Ack-Sent)
[B1]  IPADDR 194.85.82.184
[B1]   COMPPROTO VJCOMP, 16 comp. channels no comp-cid
[B1] IPCP: State change Ack-Sent --> Opened
[B1] IPCP: LayerUp
[B1]  194.85.82.184 --> 193.125.142.233
[B1] IFACE: Up event

Please write me if you have any thoughts about what's happening there.
